extortion.description: [AI generated] Satco.com is an online retailer for SATCO Products, Inc., a leading supplier of lighting products, components, and accessories. With a history that spans over 50 years, SATCO offers a diverse product line that includes LEDs, downlights, decorative and functional lighting, as well as electrical accessories. Known for their innovation, quality, and customer service, the company caters to various markets such as residential, commercial, and specialty lighting.
